```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Set up log aggregation and centralized logging"
---
# Log Aggregation
## Task
Set up centralized log aggregation.
## Requirements
1. Collect logs from all services and containers. 2. Structure logs in JSON format.
3. Implement log correlation with request IDs. 4. Set up log shipping and indexing.
5. Create dashboards for log analysis.
## Constraints
- Structured JSON logs. Include timestamp, level, service, request_id. Rotate and expire old logs.
## Success Criteria
- All logs centralized. Structured and searchable. Correlation works. Dashboards useful.
```
